summary: Added initial sample Melee libraries to the project configuration, including `cm` with matching `melee/cm/cmsnap.c` and `db` with nonmatching `melee/db/db_2253.c`. The PR also extended GALE01 splits for those source files, renamed several placeholder symbols to more meaningful library-prefixed names, and tightened Python typing around library dictionaries in `configure.py` and `tools/project.py`.

key_files.why: Introduced typed library helper aliases and added `MeleeLib` plus sample `cm` and `db` library entries to `config.libs`.
Added `LibDict = Dict[str, Any]` and optional/list type annotations for project configuration fields used by library generation.
Added split ranges for `melee/cm/cmsnap.c` and `melee/db/db_2253.c` across text/data/bss/sdata/sbss/sdata2 as applicable.
Renamed selected placeholder function symbols to library-aware names such as `cmSnap_*`, `GObj_Create`, and `GObj_SetupGXLinkMax`.

what_changed: Added `Objects = List[Object]` in `configure.py` and changed `Lib`, `DolphinLib`, and `SysdolphinLib` signatures to use typed object lists and `LibDict` returns.
Imported `LibDict` from `tools.project` and removed broader `Any`/`Dict` imports from `configure.py` in favor of more specific typing.
Changed `Lib.make_includes` to return an `Iterator[str]` using `map`, while still expanding the iterator into list literals in returned `cflags` and `host_cflags`.
Removed the unused REL helper and `cflags_rel` block from `configure.py` in this slice.
Added a `MeleeLib` helper that extends base includes with `src/melee` and `src/melee/ft/chara`, and extends system includes with `src/dolphin` and `src/sysdolphin`.
Renamed the Sysdolphin library label from `Sysdolphin` to lowercase `sysdolphin`.
Added GALE01 split sections for `melee/cm/cmsnap.c`, covering `.text`, `.data`, and `.bss`.
Added GALE01 split sections for `melee/db/db_2253.c`, covering `.text`, `.rodata`, `.data`, `.bss`, `.sdata`, `.sbss`, and `.sdata2`.
Renamed sysdolphin baselib symbols `fn_803901F0` and `fn_8039075C` to `GObj_Create` and `GObj_SetupGXLinkMax`.
Added `LibDict` and several `Optional[...]` annotations to `ProjectConfig` fields in `tools/project.py`.
smart_moves: Centralized Melee-specific include paths in a `MeleeLib` helper instead of duplicating `-i src/melee`, `src/melee/ft/chara`, `src/dolphin`, and `src/sysdolphin` flags on every Melee library.
Separated library configuration by domain: `SysdolphinLib` for sysdolphin sources and `MeleeLib` for game sources, making future additions to `config.libs` more regular.
Used explicit `Matching` and `NonMatching` object status when adding sample Melee files, preserving progress/build semantics while allowing nonmatching work-in-progress files to be tracked.
Added splits before or alongside library entries so build tooling can associate source files with concrete address ranges and sections.
Improved symbol names from generic `fn_` placeholders to subsystem-specific names where there was enough evidence, which helps searchability and future decompilation references.
decomp_lessons: When adding a new source file to `configure.py`, also add the corresponding ranges to `config/GALE01/splits.txt`; the library entry alone is not enough for clean project organization.
Create subsystem-specific library helpers when a group of files shares include requirements. This reduces flag drift as more Melee libraries are added.
Keep nonmatching source files in the build configuration with `Object(NonMatching, ...)` so they are visible to tooling without claiming a match.
Use placeholder-but-informative symbol prefixes such as `cmSnap_` or `lb_` when full function names are unknown but subsystem ownership is known.
Build configuration refactors are good opportunities to introduce typing aliases like `LibDict` when the project repeatedly passes structured dictionaries around.

naming_conventions.pattern: Melee library helper names use CamelCase with `Lib` suffix
Library identifiers in `config.libs` are lowercase subsystem names
Unknown functions can be upgraded from `fn_<address>` to subsystem-prefixed placeholders when ownership is known
Known sysdolphin GObj symbols use `GObj_` prefix with descriptive verb phrase
Split file entries mirror source paths under subsystem directories

assembly_or_matching_tactics: Marked `melee/cm/cmsnap.c` as `Matching`, indicating it was suitable for normal matched object handling in the sample Melee library setup.
Marked `melee/db/db_2253.c` as `NonMatching`, allowing the file to be represented in the library and splits without asserting a match.
Defined detailed section ranges for `db_2253.c`, including small-data sections `.sdata`, `.sbss`, and `.sdata2`, which is important for correct data placement and progress accounting.
No assembly-level matching discussion, codegen trick, or reviewer-provided matching rationale appears in the provided PR slice.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that add more `MeleeLib` entries to `configure.py`.
Search for subsequent renames of `cmSnap_800315C8` through `cmSnap_800316B4` to final function names.
Search for later work on `melee/db/db_2253.c` becoming matching.
Check whether the lowercase `sysdolphin` library name became the lasting convention for library identifiers.
Find PRs that further typed `tools/project.py` or replaced raw library dictionaries with structured objects.
